Rail Position: True
Dual Track Meeting: N
Track Type: Turf
Track Condition: Soft 7
Weather: Showers
Penetrometer:
Track Information: Track changed to Soft 6 post gallop at 6.40am
FinalFields Last Published: Fri 24-Apr-26 8:35AM AEST
Riders must be declared before: Wed 22-Apr-26 12:00PM AEST
Scratching close: Fri 24-Apr-26 7:30AM AEST
Total Number of starters for this meeting (including emergencies) 77

  From 1 September 2022, 1.5% of prizemoney will be paid to the Equine Welfare Fund, with 1% paid to the Jockeys Welfare Fund.



Race 1 - 12:19PM JIM & VAL BROWNING COUNTRY BOOSTED MDN HCP (1400 METRES)
Of $30,000.1st $15,000, 2nd $5,300, 3rd $2,800, 4th $1,475, 5th $975, 6th $800, 7th $725, 8th $725, 9th $725, 10th $725, Equine Welfare Fund $450 , Jockey Welfare Fund $300.
Maiden, Handicap, Minimum Weight 55.5kg, Apprentices can claim.
BOBS Silver Bonus Available Up To $9625

Field Limit: 14 + 4 EM CLICK ON HORSE NAME FOR VIDEO FORM
